Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Initial Responses To Pltf'S Requests For Production, Sert One And Requests For Sanctions In The Amount Of $1050.00
Off Calendar Jul-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances - The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CONSUMER ADVOCACY GROUP, INC.'S Motion To Compel Initial Responses To Plaintiff'S Requests For Production, Set One And Requests For Sanctions In The Amount Of $1050.00. NO OPPOSITION FILED. GRANT THE MOTION FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, TO FIRST SET OF REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION, TO BE SERVED, ALONG WITH A COPY OF ALL RESPONSIVE MATERIALS, NO LATER THAN 10 CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF ENTY OF THE ORDER GRANTING THIS MOTION. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP 2023.040. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Francis Conway, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)
